text: In this space of glass walls and fluorescent light, I sense an intentional emptiness, as if waiting for thought or collaboration to ignite. Passing into the exhibition, the bold letters R + D speak of curiosity and invention, but I also notice how sterile and orchestrated these surroundings feel. I am both observer and participant in an environment that questions how we coexist with technology and ideas. There is anticipation here, but also a subtle loneliness—a silent invitation to reflect on my role in this unfolding scene.
